case_title: HEITMAN PROPERTIES, LTD. vs. DAUD, BARRA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAUD, BARRA SAMOSIR, RUMONDANG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 75 BUCKINGHAM WAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $5,923.73 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,923.73, STAYED UNTIL OCT-15-1998, $5,923.73 TO BE PAID AS FOLLOWS: $4,846.32 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE 9/9/98 AND $1,077.41 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE 10/1/98 TO A TOTAL OF $5,923.73. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
